acceptance.assertion: Opportunistic, required, strict, live-first, and external-safe rLens modes are represented deterministically.
A required/strict task without rLens context records a machine-readable skip or block reason.

goal: Add Bureau task-class policy so repo/PR/roadmap/architecture work records rLens refs or explicit skip reasons while live-first tasks remain unblocked.
title: Enforce rLens context refs in Bureau modes
